# GetSmoke

> GetSmoke is an online vape shop based in the United States selling disposable vapes, pods, e-liquids, and accessories from major brands. Fast US shipping, same-day delivery in Houston, Dallas, Austin, and San Antonio. 21+ only. All products contain nicotine, which is an addictive chemical.

## About

- [About GetSmoke](https://getsmoke.com/about-us/): Company background and what we sell
- [Contact](https://getsmoke.com/contact/): Customer support contact info
- [Vape Shop Texas](https://getsmoke.com/vape-shop-texas/): Local Texas vape shop information

## Brands We Carry

- [Geek Bar](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/geek-bar/): 131 products including Geek Bar Pulse, Pulse X, Meloso Mini, Lush, and Skyview
- [Juicy Bar](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/juicy-bar-jb7500/): JB5000, JB7500, JB25000 PRO MAX lineup
- [Lost Mary](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/lost-mary/): MT35000 Turbo, MT15000, Ultrasonic, Nera Fullview/Pureview kits
- [Raz](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/raz/): DC25000, TN9000, TN9000 Zero, Frozen Edition
- [HQD](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/hqd/): Cuvie Plus, Cuvie Glaze, Cuvie Slick, Everest, Mars, Shisha
- [FUME](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/fume/): Extra, Pro, Hookah, Infinity, Eternity
- [Fifty Bar](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/fifty-bar/): Original, x Fruitia, White Series, Black Series
- [Flum Pebble](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/flum-pebble/): Compact pod-style disposable
- [Foger](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/foger/): Switch Pro Kit, Bit 35k, replacement pods
- [VIHO](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/viho/): TRX, Supercharge, Supercharge Pro, Turbo
- [Oxbar](https://getsmoke.com/product-tag/oxbar/): Astro Maze and other Oxbar products

## Popular Flavor Categories

- [Strawberry](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/strawberry/): 127 strawberry-forward disposable vapes
- [Mint](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/mint/): 96 mint and menthol-mint disposables
- [Watermelon](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/watermelon/): 91 watermelon flavors
- [Menthol](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/menthol/): 80 menthol options
- [Tobacco](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/tobacco/): 71 tobacco-flavored vapes
- [Blueberry](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/blueberry/): 61 blueberry products
- [Mango](https://getsmoke.com/product-category/mango/): 55 mango-forward options

## Resources and Guides

- [Blog](https://getsmoke.com/blog/): Reviews, comparison guides, and how-to content for disposable vapes
- [TSA Vape Rules in Texas](https://getsmoke.com/can-i-bring-a-vape-through-tsa-in-texas/): Travel guide for flying with disposable vapes
- [Legal Age to Vape in Texas](https://getsmoke.com/what-is-the-legal-age-to-vape-in-texas/): State-specific age requirements

## Important Information

All products sold on GetSmoke are intended exclusively for adults of legal smoking age (21+ in the United States). GetSmoke does not sell to minors. Nicotine is an addictive chemical. Products are subject to FDA regulations on tobacco and vapor products.
